organization.short_description:
Infosys Limited is a leading global provider of digital services and consulting, based in Bengaluru, India. Founded in 1981 by seven engineers, the company has grown to employ over 331,000 people and generates approximately US$19.7 billion in revenue. Infosys is publicly traded on both the New York Stock Exchange and the Bombay Stock Exchange, with a market capitalization of around US$68 billion.

The company offers a wide range of services, including cloud services, data analytics, application development, cybersecurity, and business process outsourcing. Infosys is known for its innovative Global Delivery Model, which utilizes distributed teams to efficiently manage projects. The company has also developed several key products, such as Finacle, an advanced core banking software suite, and Aster, an AI-powered platform aimed at improving marketing efficiency. With a presence in over 50 countries, Infosys serves a diverse client base across North America, Europe, Asia, and Australia.
